title: Neboptimization
description: A Modpack which is focused to optimize Minecraft's FPS and add some QOL Features
body:
## Neboptimization

This Modpack adds some QOL mods and optimization mods!

What it makes different from a lot of other modpacks:

 1. New optimization mods are added very fast
 2. It does not change settings so much that you think it is a new game
 3. It uses Quilt
 4. Only Mods that are on Modrinth avaible.

btw. works on school computers
test
